SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
AlertHelper
Utility class for displaying customized JavaFX alert dialogs.
AnswerOption
Represents an answer option.
BaseController
BaseController provides shared accessibility behaviour for all controllers.
BaseProfileController
Controller for the base profiles screens.
ChangePasswordController
Controller for the change user password screen.
ChangeTeacherPasswordController
Controller for updating teacher password.
DatabaseConnection
The driver class for connection with the persistent database Establishes the connection with the sqlite trivia database.
farmHouseController
Controller class for farmhouse object.
GameInstructionsController
A public class that displays the game instructions to the screen for the user.
HomepageController
Controller for the user's homepage screen.
LoginController
Controller class for managing the login process.
MainController
 
OnBoarding
Main entry point for the JavaFX application.
OnBoardingController
Controller class for the onboarding screen.
Parent
Represents a parent user in the application.
ParentRegisterController
Controller class for the Parent registration screen.
ProfileController
Controller for the profile screen.
QuizBegin
Entry point for quizzes.
QuizBeginApiService
Quiz api handler for the quiz questions.
QuizBeginController
Quiz controller for quiz entry.
QuizQuestionsController
Quiz controller for question logic and updates.
QuizResultsController
Quiz controller for quiz results.
QuizSessionController
Quiz session controller handles the return of current quiz session question.
RoleSelectionController
Controller class for the role selection screen.
Session
Class for conveniently storing session information.
SettingsController
Controller for the settings screen.
SpeechHelper
A helper class that provides Text-To-Speech (TTS) functionality using the operating system's built-in speech engine.
Student
Represents a student user in the application.
StudentDetailsController
Controller for the student details screen.
StudentRegisterController
Controller class for the Student registration screen.
Teacher
Represents a teacher user in the application.
TeacherParentHomescreenController
Controller for the parent and teacher's homepage screen.
TeacherRegisterController
Controller class for the Teacher registration screen.
TriviaQuestion
Represents a trivia question to be used in quizzes.
UpdateTeacherDetailsController
Controller for the update teacher details screen.
UpdateUserDetailsController
Controller for the update user details screen.
Users
Represents a base user in the application.
ViewLevelProgressController
Controller for the screen displaying the user's level progress.
